message:
Add implicit wildcard fallback for sparse results (sux.4)

- Add SearchResult struct with wildcard_fallback indicator
- Add search_with_fallback() method with configurable sparse threshold
- Automatically retry with *term* wildcards when results < threshold
- Display "✱ fuzzy" indicator in footer when fallback is active
- Only fallback on first page (offset=0) and when query lacks wildcards
- Prefer fallback results only if they return more hits

This improves search UX by automatically finding related content when
exact matches are sparse, while clearly indicating to users when fuzzy
matching is being used.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
